# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  - name: spName
    type: string
    description: Service Principal name for CI/CD automation.
  - name: spPassword
    type: string
    description: Service Principal password for CI/CD automation.

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities
    name: $(spName)
    properties:
      displayName: $(spName)

  - type: Microsoft.Graph/servicePrincipals
    name: $(spName)
    properties:
      displayName: $(spName)
      passwordCredentials:
        - value: $(spPassword)
      oauth2PermissionScopes:
        - oauth2PermissionScope:
            type: Microsoft.ApplicationInsights.Data.InstrumentationKey
            admin: true

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    name: $(spName)SubscriptionRoleAssignment
    properties:
      principalId: $(spName)
      roleDefinitionId: "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/Contributor"

outputs:
  - name: spName
    value: $(spName)
  - name: spPassword
    value: $(spPassword)
